programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After winning a million dollars, a woman gives her son her old condo in Ponte Vedra Beach, Fla. And seeks a home big enough for her and her hobbies.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple's lakeside retirement dream is now a reality after they won on a Massachusetts scratch-off ticket.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Ana and Rafael had always planned on retiring from their life in New York City to paradise in Puerto Rico, so when Ana wins $1 million, they find they can retire early and buy their dream home sooner rather than later.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A husband and wife decide they want to live close to their eldest son in Buffalo, N.Y.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A mother shops for a dream home with her daughters in Cape Cod, Mass.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Kathy and her son Gene decide to return to their southern roots by moving back to Alabama and enjoying the fishing and painting.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Massachusetts native Linda was unable to afford her own home until she won $4 million, and now can buy her dream house in her hometown.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Two brothers are fortunate to reap the benefits of their parents' lottery win and search for their very own dream homes in Sarasota, Fla.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A California couple already has their forever home, so after winning a million dollars in the lottery, they set out to find a dream vacation home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A young Massachusetts couple with six kids felt cramped in their water damaged two-bedroom house, but after winning, they're finally able to buy a home big enough for their huge family.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After winning a state record $7 million on a single scratch ticket, a Midwest dad hunts for the perfect family home for his partner and kids in their rural Indiana neighborhood.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A husband and wife decide they want to live close to their eldest son in Buffalo, N.Y.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A mother shops for a dream home with her daughters in Cape Cod, Mass.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Kathy and her son Gene decide to return to their southern roots by moving back to Alabama and enjoying the fishing and painting.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Massachusetts native Linda was unable to afford her own home until she won $4 million, and now can buy her dream house in her hometown.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Two brothers are fortunate to reap the benefits of their parents' lottery win and search for their very own dream homes in Sarasota, Fla.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A California couple already has their forever home, so after winning a million dollars in the lottery, they set out to find a dream vacation home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A young Massachusetts couple with six kids felt cramped in their water damaged two-bedroom house, but after winning, they're finally able to buy a home big enough for their huge family.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After winning a state record $7 million on a single scratch ticket, a Midwest dad hunts for the perfect family home for his partner and kids in their rural Indiana neighborhood.

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: A couple is torn between a family-ready home and their century-old farmhouse.

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: A man loves the location of his house, but his wife feels confined by the cramped living area, and would prefer a more open concept in the country.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Kerry wants to look like a snack on her wedding day, but her outrageous entourage keeps stealing her spotlight; Gretchen needs a gown all four of her sisters will love; Alex is back for her fitting, but she's wondering if she made the right choice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: After transitioning, Chloe hopes to find a dress that makes her feel like her true self; Jenny looks for a dress that takes the term center stage to a whole new level; Danielle is just hoping her dress fits.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Emerald tries to convince her wedding-planner mom to let her double her dress budget, and singer Jillian looks to her dad for approval; Elaina is back for her fitting with her sister, a diva with a capital D.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A salon stylist says she wanted to brighten her client's day after hearing her life story, but when the young woman ghosted her, she was left with 30 inches of dyed human hair and no head on which to put it.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: An out-of-work dog trainer is evicted during the pandemic after failing to pay her rent; a man says he bought a car from a strapped-for-cash seller, but with $6,000 still left to pay off, the car was repossessed.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: The plaintiff's late mother's beloved dog, Peanut, is attacked by an emotional-support Rottweiler mix at a dog park.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A couple who moved from a homeless shelter into an apartment say the neighbors conspire to get them evicted, and the landlord accuses them of vandalism and keeping a feral cat against the terms of the lease.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A huge hunk of wind-damaged roof lands on a tenant's car after the landlord ignores her requests to get the roof fixed.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: Two young women with extreme anxiety lived together for three months, and recounting it all brings a deluge of tears.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A man sues his 12-year-old daughter's mother for repayment of a loan.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman sues her former landlady, who she believes had friends leave her harassing voicemail messages, which she has brought to court.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman sues her much-younger ex-boyfriend for vandalizing her home and emotional distress.

programme.title: America's Funniest Home Videos
programme.desc: Easter-themed videos; a wild raccoon finds its way into an office and scares workers; a dog wants to join a family in the process of making pizza; a gender-reveal balloon sails away before the reveal.

programme.title: America's Funniest Home Videos
programme.desc: A woman's encounter with buffaloes; a little boy and a llama; a brother who doesn't enjoy his sister's music recital; a youngster denying he has eaten candy despite the evidence; a toddler whose dad takes his corn on the cob.

In 1946, Branch Rickey (Harrison Ford), legendary manager of the Brooklyn Dodgers, defies major league baseball's notorious color barrier by signing Jackie Robinson (Chadwick Boseman) to the team. The heroic act puts both Rickey and Robinson in the firing line of the public, the press and other players. Facing open racism from all sides, Robinson demonstrates true courage and admirable restraint b

programme.title: King Richard
programme.desc: Armed with a clear vision and a brazen, 78-page plan, Richard Williams is determined to write his two daughters, Venus and Serena, into history. Training on tennis courts in Compton, Calif., Richard shapes the girls' unyielding commitment and keen intuition. Together, the Williams family defies seemingly insurmountable odds and the prevailing expectations laid before them.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The police break up a dog-fighting ring and discover a woman's finger inside one of the dead animals; detectives plot to trick an ambitious reporter.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When an art dealer is found stoned to death, detectives suspect that her killing may be linked to some of the art in her gallery, but a deeper look into her personal life reveals another motive.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a notorious hustler is found dead, Cyrus Lupo discovers that his partner, Ed Green, is the shooter; internal affairs takes over the case, forcing Green to reveal his troubled past.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Cyrus Lupo and Kevin Bernard have reason to believe a cult is involved when a novelist is found dead in her car; Assistant District Attorney Michael Cutter has trouble prosecuting when several jury members fear for their own safety.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a legal aid striker is killed outside the courthouse, the sand in his wounds leads detectives to investigate a greensman; due to the strike and shortage of defense attorneys, Rubirosa and Cutter must face each other in court.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of an automobile mechanic leads detectives to uncover a fraudulent online relationship, a bizarre case of blackmail and money laundering.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a jeweler leads detectives to an illegal prostitution ring; Jack McCoy's job is threatened.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The beating death of a stockbroker causes a battle of epic proportions between the victim's family and the faction responsible for his death.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A mentally challenged man is reunited with his mother, who gave him away after his brother was killed.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A young woman (guest star Jena Malone) escapes from a polygamous cult.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Thelma Lou uses Gomer and flirts with him to make Barney jealous after he says that he has her in his hip pocket. Things escalate when she slips and kisses Gomer on the cheek.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Goober's girlfriend fills in for him at the station and proves to be efficient.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie upsets the whole town when he proves that the famous Battle of Mayberry was only a bloodless brawl.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee's original song about Mayberry is a hit when it's played by a rock 'n' roll star on TV.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie's friendship with an athletically superior girl blossoms when she follows the advice of an older female.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Goober blackballs county clerk Howard when he applies for membership in the Mayberry men's lodge.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The Mayberry barbershop quartet loses its tenor on the eve of its singing contest.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy umpires a crucial junior baseball game and when one of his decisions loses the game for Mayberry, he becomes the town pariah.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee buys a wig and upsets Andy and the rest of Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and the town of Mayberry undergo a trying experience when the Darling family comes into a fortune of $300.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Goober, convinced that he has a severe case of whiplash, promptly becomes a helpless invalid.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee and Howard both decide to run for the office of town councilman.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Helen and her teenage students convince the principal the younger generation is no different from his own.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie and his friend find an abandoned baby and run into trouble when they try to find it some new parents.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard, a non-fisherman, antagonizes the town's sportsmen by catching the biggest fish in the lake.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie accidentally ruins Aunt Bee's prize rose entry on the eve of the annual Mayberry Flower Show.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis and Howard rescue Andy, who has been taken prisoner by a pair of desperate bank robbers.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Inarticulate Goober grows a beard and suddenly turns into a verbose philosopher.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The town's new doctor is shunned by all the Mayberry citizens.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A crane collapse kills a man, and it may not have been an accident; a rift forms between Jack McCoy and Michael Cutter.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A revered sheriff becomes a possible conspirator in a case involving a murdered tourist.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Lupo and Bernard investigate when the writer of a best-selling memoir is found dead in a community of male prostitutes.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cutter is determined to expose misconduct when he realizes an old friend working in the system is obstructing justice in the murder of an environmentalist.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of two divorce lawyers, detectives Lupo and Bernard uncover a child slave-trade ring.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of the plaintiff in a high-profile lawsuit against a major airline leads detectives to a defense attorney (Dallas Roberts) who is willing to do whatever it takes to ensure his big payday.

programme.title: The Face Doctors
programme.desc: Kamil seeks prosthetist Nigel's help after losing half of his nose; Surgeon Vijay pieces together Dean's shattered jaw and cheekbone.

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: Twenty-seven-year-old Taffy presents physically as a 4-year-old; Adrienne's rare disorder has left both her eyes completely covered by skin; Baby Brody undergoes a procedure to fix a severe cleft palate.

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: Piyah must walk on her hands because she was born with a body that ends at her waist; Joe is the first survivor of a successful hands and face transplant; tumors have left Reggie's face unrecognizable, and threaten his independence.

programme.title: Most Extreme Humans
programme.desc: Mark's hands are 20 times bigger than a normal adult male's. After learning that his condition may require amputation, Mark stopped seeing doctors. Now troubling changes to his hands means he must go back. If not for himself, then for his young daughter.

programme.title: The Face Doctors
programme.desc: Alex becomes a prisoner in his own home after having his nose surgically removed; Tracey struggles with an infected gaping hole in her neck due to an insect bite.

programme.title: The Face Doctors
programme.desc: After enduring years of torment over her looks, Holly wants a straighter nose; Leo has become isolated since losing his left eye to cancer.

programme.title: One Day in My Body
programme.desc: Piyah must walk on her hands because she was born with a body that ends at her waist; Joe is the first survivor of a successful hands and face transplant; tumors have left Reggie's face unrecognizable, and threaten his independence.

programme.title: Most Extreme Humans
programme.desc: Mark's hands are 20 times bigger than a normal adult male's. After learning that his condition may require amputation, Mark stopped seeing doctors. Now troubling changes to his hands means he must go back. If not for himself, then for his young daughter.

programme.title: The Face Doctors
programme.desc: Alex becomes a prisoner in his own home after having his nose surgically removed; Tracey struggles with an infected gaping hole in her neck due to an insect bite.

programme.title: The Face Doctors
programme.desc: After enduring years of torment over her looks, Holly wants a straighter nose; Leo has become isolated since losing his left eye to cancer.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days
programme.desc: Razvan's mom shares concerns about his relationship; Dempsey learns Statler doesn't want kids; Violet stops Riley from saying the L-word; Jasmine surprises Gino; David and Sheila share a sad goodbye; Cleo wonders about being exclusive with Christian.

programme.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programme.desc: Josh Duhamel (film "London Calling"); Derek Hough ("Dancing With the Stars," "Extra"); a girl and her father, who made headlines after he posted a vulnerable video of himself watching her get several academic awards at her school graduation ceremony.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch, Cam and Phil crash Jay's annual hiking trip to find an elusive bald eagle after Gloria asks them to keep an eye on him; Gloria, Alex, Claire and Haley get together to plan her baby shower.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Dylan and Luke are really impressed with Bill's tales of heroism and survival as a firefighter, which make Phil feel emasculated.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: In an effort to be less negative, Claire inadvertently approves of Luke's new relationship with someone from his work; Phil tries to surprise Alex at school right before she receives an award she didn't tell him about.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley and Dylan's plan to quietly elope before the babies are born doesn't go as smoothly as they had hoped; Jay continues to try and get his new business off the ground by courting an Instagram celebrity.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding
programme.desc: Two sisters plan their double gypsy wedding; a dream of becoming America's first gypsy rapper.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding
programme.desc: A gypsy couple plans their wedding, but a jealous ex-lover tries to stop them; a gypsy teen's big break in the music industry is complicated by love.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding
programme.desc: Best friends Amber and Stefanie are planning a double wedding, but a jealous cousin will stop at nothing to hijack the big day; Priscilla's birthday may turn sour if her father shows up uninvited.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville
programme.desc: After a tense start in Montana, Ethan sets out to repair his relationship with Teegan but is met with the cold shoulder; meanwhile, Lydia and Zac navigate feeling like outsiders as everyone vacations in Montana; Barry gets serious about Bigfoot.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville
programme.desc: Ethan continues to try to win back Teegan's heart, but Moriah, Isaac and Kaylynn worry it's too little too late; Ken confronts Kim about her weight, and a worried Kim drives to Wisconsin to check on Ethan.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville
programme.desc: Newlyweds Zac and Lydia struggle to mend fences with the family; Kim reclaims her life on the farm, but the memories of the past continue to haunt her; Ethan takes a leap of faith while Isaac and Kaylynn hit a rocky patch; Barry finally returns to dating.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville
programme.desc: Barry goes on his first date in over 20 years; Kim and Lydia's tense car ride takes a big U-turn when Kim brings up Lydia and Zac's judgmental behavior; reeling from the car ride, Kim seeks counseling about Joshua's death for the first time.

programme.title: Baylen Out Loud
programme.desc: With less than seven months to their big day, Baylen and Colin are still struggling to make major wedding decisions; Baylen and maid of honor Sammi are at odds over the planning of Baylen and Colin's joint bachelor and bachelorette weekend.

programme.title: Baylen Out Loud
programme.desc: When Sammi fails to show up to their joint Bach weekend, Baylen has an honest conversation with Sammi about her role; after Julie raises concerns about how remote the venue is, Baylen proposes a plan that might put the entire wedding day in jeopardy.

programme.title: Baylen Out Loud
programme.desc: Baylen's tics are in full swing as she and Colin embrace the holiday spirit by taking Christmas photos with Santa and the dogs; Allen plans a heartfelt surprise for his and Julie's 25th anniversary; Baylen and Colin reveal a major wedding decision.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Last Resort
programme.desc: During never-before-seen footage, Sarper reveals that he finds Jenny sexy; the cast discusses their surprising bathroom habits; after watching Pao say that she's like a dead cow in the bedroom, the cast plays a game of charades in cow suits.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Last Resort
programme.desc: With bonus scenes; Jenny reveals why she doesn't trust Sumit; Rebecca and Zied unravel over control; Kara and Guillermo face painful truths; Patrick and Thais disagree on how to spend their time; Pao questions her future with Russ.

Members of the 118 attempt to rescue a wellness retreat guru after his followers turn on him; an emergency call at an upscale hair salon; Maddie contemplates returning to work, Eddie and May make decisions about their future.

When a blimp suffers mechanical failure and its engine catches fire, Athena and the 118 must rescue victims both inside and outside a packed sports stadium; Bobby and Athena drop off May on her first day of college and discuss honeymoon plans.

The 118 race to the rescue when a structure collapses at a convention; Athena's father suffers a stroke; Hen stretches herself too thin with test prep and her new responsibilities at the 118; Maddie tries to help new recruit get his bearings.
While in Florida caring for her ailing father, Athena and Bobby investigate the disappearance of her childhood friend from 45 years ago.

programme.title: Live: WNBA Basketball
programme.desc: The WNBA Commissioner's Cup continues as the Sparks play the Storm at Climate Pledge Arena in their first 2026 meeting. In their last regular-season faceoff on Sept. 1, 2025, the Sparks won 91-85 in Seattle. The Storm seek to settle the score.

programme.title: Everything on the Menu With Braun Strowman
programme.desc: Braun keeps Austin weird, gobbling up biscuits before a mega meal with WWE Hall of Famer Mark Henry.

programme.title: Everything on the Menu With Braun Strowman
programme.desc: In Vegas, Braun bets it all on flavor and finds the city's true magic to be an irresistible bite.

programme.title: Everything on the Menu With Braun Strowman
programme.desc: Braun tackles Orlando eats with a roast beef icon and a showdown with the menu.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Michele Lewis' new boyfriend seems almost too good to be true, then she discovers he is a con man harboring dark secrets and embarks on a dangerous mission to expose him.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: After a tech millionaire's neighbor is found murdered, he goes on the run and plays a high-stakes game of hide-and-seek with the authorities and the press.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: The death of a mother of five tests a family's loyalty.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: The death of a mother of five tests a family's loyalty.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates a Peruvian massacre that occurred 20 years ago after it learns that a fashion model, who may have survived the incident, may now be in danger.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When Sam and Callen receive a cellphone, the caller threatens innocent lives if his instructions are not followed.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When NCIS Special Agent DiNozzo's prisoner escapes custody, he turns to the Los Angeles team for assistance.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A psychiatrist specializing in the treatment of sex offenders is found badly beaten in a crack house and one of her recently paroled patients, the "Duct Tape Rapist," is the prime suspect.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives interview an overprotective woman (Diane Verona) to find out why her son is scavenging for food in the garbage; the boy is later found dead, and his older brother confesses to killing him.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The search for the sexual abuser of a child leads the detectives to a wealthy toy mogul known for his generous hospitality toward children.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman claiming to have been the victim of rape commits suicide while she is still in the emergency room.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The son of an outspoken critic becomes the prime suspect when the star of a controversial teen show is raped in her trailer on the set.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate a man whose 12-year-old wife is hospitalized with pregnancy complications, and they learn that he is the leader of a cult.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After recovering from being shot during a robbery, Fin returns to the narcotics division to keep a promise he made to locate a missing person.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A gang member is pushed from a rooftop in what appears to be retribution for a sexual assault, but when the assault victim also turns up dead, the detectives realize the case is far more complicated.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Fin investigate the brutal rape and murder of a prostitute, and the prime suspects turn out to be a group of teens suspected of re-enacting a favorite video game.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a wealthy couple laundering money for South American drug dealers is murdered, former ADA Alexandra Cabot (Stephanie March) returns from witness protection to help solve the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler struggles to keep his emotions in check as he interrogates a man (Matthew Modine) suspected in the murder of a teenage girl -- a man he once let get away on similar charges.

programme.title: Sully
programme.desc: On Jan. 15, 2009, Capt. Chesley "Sully" Sullenberger tried to make an emergency landing in New York's Hudson River after US Airways Flight 1549 strikes a flock of geese. Miraculously, all the 155 passengers and crew survive the harrowing ordeal, and Sullenberger becomes a national hero in the eyes of the public and the media. Despite the accolades, the famed pilot now faces an investigation that t

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: This hidden-camera series follows three lifelong friends -- Brian "Q" Quinn, James "Murr" Murray and Sal Vulcano -- who take dares to an outrageous level.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Billy Beane (Brad Pitt), general manager of the Oakland A's, one day has an epiphany: Baseball's conventional wisdom is all wrong. Faced with a tight budget, Beane must reinvent his team by outsmarting the richer ball clubs. Joining forces with Ivy League graduate Peter Brand (Jonah Hill), Beane prepares to challenge old-school traditions. He recruits bargain-bin players whom the scouts have label

programme.title: Air
programme.desc: Sonny Vaccaro and Nike pursue basketball rookie Michael Jordan, creating a partnership that revolutionizes the world of sports and contemporary culture.

programme.title: Air
programme.desc: Sonny Vaccaro and Nike pursue basketball rookie Michael Jordan, creating a partnership that revolutionizes the world of sports and contemporary culture.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes
programme.desc: Going behind the scenes to find out which challenge the Jokers were desperate to try for years, what the heck a "goomara" is, and how long it took to put together Murr's surprise flash mob punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes
programme.desc: Going behind the scenes to find out how Sal gets burned in his creepy haunted house punishment.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Sal, Q and Murr kick off another season of antics by getting themselves stuck in a vent system and confusing customers at a bagel shop; our losing Joker will face humiliation in a punishment that's tough to swallow.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are back working as dry cleaners and TV producers, but one of them can't keep it together and must endure concertgoers who have escaped their enclosures.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers face off by recording voiceover for a fake video game and playing the concerned parent writing to their kid's school; but one Joker burns out with a punishment that's gotta sting.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Joey Fatone interviews the Jokers for a fake documentary; the guys react to an overly emotional phone call for an underwhelming reason; one Joker checks out and is forced into being the world's worst grocery store employee in his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers hit the grocery store aisles dressed in absurd disguises, then train someone in using aggressive phone tactics for charity donations; the losing Joker must subject themselves to scientific probing into their hidden emotions.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers can't contain the laughs as they answer survey questions for a new snack food and present the world's worst pharmaceutical ads; the loser will work up a sweat in a punishment that's all pain, no gain.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Attention shoppers; the Jokers make mischief by taking unflattering pictures of grocery store patrons, then posing as horrible employees at the Yeti store; tonight's loser must meet his fate in a punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers play unprofessional actors in a fake commercial then make wild assumptions about other mall goers; one Joker breaks and is tasked with becoming the strictest security guard imaginable in his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers pretend to be medical students in training with standardized patient actors, then play the hero and break up a public fight, hoping to earn applause; one Joker has to put his hips where his mouth is and settle a bet of his own making.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The jokers are asking strangers to send an important text to their loved ones and hunting for their missing kid using crazy descriptions.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers hatch horrible revenge schemes on their office bullies, then put one poor contractor through the wringer as they attempt home improvement projects; tonight's loser will be gifted the world's finest douchemobile.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are back as wacky inventors pitching a whole new line of AI-themed gadgets; they fill out bogus incident reports with unsuspecting deli customers; the loser will be forced to demonstrate mentally absurd and physically grueling apps.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers pretend to be bellhops and need to do and say what they're told while assisting unsuspecting guests to their rooms. Then, the guys need to give away tickets to an absurd made-up show they can no longer see.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers' mothers visit as overprotective parents meeting a Joker's girlfriend; a Joker must convince a stranger to pose as his girlfriend for a Broadway outing with his mother.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: While returning from vacation, the Smiths' airplane crashes, and they wash up on a deserted island where the family members begin to turn on each other.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Francine's newfound friendship with a frog brings excitement to the whole Smith household; unfortunately, it drives their neighbor, Greg, crazy.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Steve goes on a class trip to Philadelphia, where he hopes to fall in love.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Roger is forced to confront himself after a series of accidents; Klaus and Jeff bond.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Steve profiles Stan for an essay contest at school; Francine uses a port-a-potty.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Roger and Steve try to save a dying mall.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Barry blows out his dad's speakers and Snot helps him replace them; Stan attempts to do a standing backflip.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan is forced to co-lead a scouts troop with Hayley while Steve blunders in his fantasy world.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Jeff's people pleasing nature gets in the way of his relationship with Hayley; Stan wears a confusing costume to the CIA costume party.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: When Francine successfully grows a garden, it reminds Roger he knows a recipe for truly authentic jambalaya.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Hoping to teach him the value of sharing, the family recreates a television show from Klaus' childhood; Roger has a piano recital.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Steve starts a work-study program and discovers that not all is what it seems at Channel 3 News; Roger seeks redemption in the Nashville country music scene.

programme.title: Cinderella Man
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, ex-boxer James J. Braddock (Russell Crowe) works as a day laborer until his former manager Joe Gould (Paul Giamatti) offers him a one-time slot against a rising young contender. After he wins a shocking upset, Braddock goes back into the ring full time, against the wishes of his frightened wife, Mae (Renée Zellweger). Dubbed "The Cinderella Man" for his rags-to-riches

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2
programme.desc: A clash between good and evil awaits as young Harry, Ron and Hermione prepare for a final battle against Lord Voldemort. Harry has grown into a steely lad on a mission to rid the world of evil. The friends must search for the Horcruxes that keep the dastardly wizard immortal. Harry and Voldemort meet at Hogwarts Castle for a showdown where the forces of darkness may finally meet their match.

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: The follow-up to "Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone" finds young wizard Harry Potter and his friends, Ron and Hermione, facing new challenges during their second year at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry as they try to discover a dark force that is terrorizing the school.

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: After surviving an assault from a squad of hit men, retired CIA agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) reassembles his old team for an all-out war. Frank reunites with old Joe (Morgan Freeman), crazy Marvin (John Malkovich) and wily Victoria (Helen Mirren) to uncover a massive conspiracy that threatens their lives. Only their expert training will allow them to survive a near-impossible mission -- breaki

programme.title: Red 2
programme.desc: Former CIA black-ops agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) and his old partner, Marvin Boggs (John Malkovich), are caught in the grip of retirement -- but that soon changes when a powerful Cold War weapon known as Nightshade resurfaces decades after its disappearance. With assassins hot on their trail, Frank and his team set out to find the one scientist (Anthony Hopkins) who can unravel the mystery of

programme.title: Knock at the Cabin
programme.desc: While vacationing at a remote cabin in the woods, a young girl and her parents are taken hostage by four armed strangers who demand they make an unthinkable choice to avert the apocalypse. Confused, scared and with limited access to the outside world, the family must decide what they believe before all is lost.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: With innocent victims caught in the crossfire in Los Angeles' intensifying war on crime, both cop John Spartan (Sylvester Stallone) and violent thug Simon Phoenix (Wesley Snipes) are sentenced to a state of frozen incarceration known as "CryoPrison." When Spartan is finally thawed 36 years later, it's 2032, and Los Angeles is now a pacifist utopia called San Angeles. But with Phoenix again on the

programme.title: Imaginary
programme.desc: When Jessica moves back into her childhood home with her family, her youngest stepdaughter, Alice, finds a stuffed bear named Chauncey. As Alice's behavior becomes more and more concerning, Jessica intervenes only to realize that Chauncey is much more than the stuffed toy bear she believed him to be.

programme.title: Knock at the Cabin
programme.desc: While vacationing at a remote cabin in the woods, a young girl and her parents are taken hostage by four armed strangers who demand they make an unthinkable choice to avert the apocalypse. Confused, scared and with limited access to the outside world, the family must decide what they believe before all is lost.

programme.title: The Exorcist
programme.desc: One of the most profitable horror movies ever made, this tale of an exorcism is based loosely on actual events. When young Regan (Linda Blair) starts acting odd -- levitating, speaking in tongues -- her worried mother (Ellen Burstyn) seeks medical help, only to hit a dead end. A local priest (Jason Miller), however, thinks the girl may be seized by the devil. The priest makes a request to perform

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: After surviving an assault from a squad of hit men, retired CIA agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) reassembles his old team for an all-out war. Frank reunites with old Joe (Morgan Freeman), crazy Marvin (John Malkovich) and wily Victoria (Helen Mirren) to uncover a massive conspiracy that threatens their lives. Only their expert training will allow them to survive a near-impossible mission -- breaki

programme.title: Red 2
programme.desc: Former CIA black-ops agent Frank Moses (Bruce Willis) and his old partner, Marvin Boggs (John Malkovich), are caught in the grip of retirement -- but that soon changes when a powerful Cold War weapon known as Nightshade resurfaces decades after its disappearance. With assassins hot on their trail, Frank and his team set out to find the one scientist (Anthony Hopkins) who can unravel the mystery of

programme.title: While the Rest of Us Die
programme.desc: Cold War plans for nuclear war empower the U.S. president to rip up the Constitution and blow up the world, and there's nothing citizens can do to stop it.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Analyzing whether aliens supplied the missing link that accelerated human evolution, advancing civilization.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A cemetery in Aurora, Texas claims to hold the body of an alien; petroglyphs depict strange beings in Utah; 19th century ranchers report seeing an otherworldly creature emerge from Elizabeth Lake; the home of Wyatt Earp in Tombstone, Ariz.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Theorists speculate that a flying creature described by Hindu scripture may have been an alien craft; researchers wonder whether centaurs and other fabled creatures were the result of extraterrestrial transplantation procedures.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Asking if aliens could be human time travelers from the future or if a trick shot could classify a person as superhuman; someone may have found the lost Malaysian Airlines Flight 370 hiding in the jungle.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: A sword discovered at the bottom of a river may be the famed Excalibur, wielded by King Arthur himself; a doorbell cam captures possible proof of teleportation; aliens could be visiting a family every Independence Day.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: A flying object caught on U.S. government cameras; a strange sound traveling through 5,000 miles of ocean; the sighting of an apparent ghost ship floating in Lake Superior.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Examining whether centuries-old photos are proof that reincarnation is actually occurring; whether nuclear waste off the coast of Russia could be creating an army of mutant fish; secret government space weapons.

programme.title: While the Rest of Us Die
programme.desc: From major disasters to civil unrest, when crises arise, the vast machinery of a system designed to protect its citizenry comes up short.

programme.title: While the Rest of Us Die
programme.desc: The U.S. government spends decades and trillions of dollars on plans to save itself in the event of a doomsday-like emergency.

programme.title: While the Rest of Us Die
programme.desc: Cold War plans for nuclear war empower the U.S. president to rip up the Constitution and blow up the world, and there's nothing citizens can do to stop it.

programme.title: While the Rest of Us Die
programme.desc: From major disasters to civil unrest, when crises arise, the vast machinery of a system designed to protect its citizenry comes up short.

programme.title: While the Rest of Us Die
programme.desc: The U.S. government spends decades and trillions of dollars on plans to save itself in the event of a doomsday-like emergency.

programme.title: While the Rest of Us Die
programme.desc: Cold War plans for nuclear war empower the U.S. president to rip up the Constitution and blow up the world, and there's nothing citizens can do to stop it.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Silver Eagle Rarity
programme.desc: RCTV is offering a groundbreaking 2025 American Silver Eagle featuring the first ever Eagle privy mark, graded perfect MS70. This unique issue ties for the lowest mintage Silver eagle and marks the first time an Eagle has been seen on the obverse!

programme.title: Silver Eagle Rarity
programme.desc: RCTV is offering a groundbreaking 2025 American Silver Eagle featuring the first ever Eagle privy mark, graded perfect MS70. This unique issue ties for the lowest mintage Silver eagle and marks the first time an Eagle has been seen on the obverse!

programme.title: Hunting ISIS
programme.desc: Unpaid and unsanctioned by their own government, a handful of American volunteers leave their homes and loved ones to join the fight against ISIS in Iraq and Syria.

programme.title: Hunting ISIS
programme.desc: In Syria, PJ's unit attacks the city of Al-Shaddadi but avoids heavy combat; a frustrated PJ heads home; in Tennessee, Jeremiah is desperate to return to war; new faces join Pete's medical team in preparation for the impending siege of Mosul in Iraq.

programme.title: Hunting ISIS
programme.desc: PJ returns to Syria, inspired by Levi's sacrifice; in Iraq, ISIS is losing ground in Mosul but stages a diversionary attack in the city of Kirkuk; Pete reaches a breaking point as casualties stack up in Mosul; there's still a long road ahead.

programme.title: How to Rob a Bank
programme.desc: Stuck in a dead-end job, David Ghantt decides to take destiny into his own hands and commits the second-largest bank heist in US history, stealing over $17 million.

programme.title: How to Rob a Bank
programme.desc: For Cuban exile Karl Monzon and his crew, stealing seven million from Miami Airport is the easy part, keeping it proves far harder, as the gang spirals out of control.

programme.title: How to Rob a Bank
programme.desc: Bank manager Louis Early Jr. reunites with his long-lost father, a career criminal, and he becomes the inside man in a series of family-run heists.

programme.title: How to Rob a Bank
programme.desc: Richard Stanley loves tacos, but when he can't pay the check, he decides that enough is enough and robs a bank; Stanley quickly becomes one of San Diego's most notorious stickup men.

programme.title: How to Rob a Bank
programme.desc: Christian rock musician and aspiring pro poker player Clay Tumey goes on a nine-month bank robbing spree to fund his gambling before turning himself in.

programme.title: United Gangs of America
programme.desc: The Yakuza's shadowy world is uncovered; where sharp-suited gangsters move money, eliminate rivals and serve their fingers up on a platter.

programme.title: United Gangs of America
programme.desc: Loyal and lethal, Aryan Sisters fly under the radar for white supremacist prison gangs; former members share stories of deadly crime and complicity.

programme.title: United Gangs of America
programme.desc: Born among California's farmworkers and hardened in prison, Nuestra Familia became the nerve center for thousands; insiders reveal their violent rise and deadly code.

programme.title: United Gangs of America
programme.desc: With no leader, the Fresno Bulldogs claw their way to the top of the food chain.

programme.title: United Gangs of America
programme.desc: Black mafia family means stacks of cocaine, cars, cash and flash; interviewing members of Big Meech's drug syndicate.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: Scientists, soldiers and adventurers unite to explore a mythical, uncharted island in the Pacific Ocean. Cut off from everything they know, they venture into the domain of the mighty Kong, igniting the ultimate battle between man and nature. As their mission of discovery soon becomes one of survival, they must fight to escape from a primal world where humanity does not belong.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: Members of the crypto-zoological agency Monarch face off against a battery of god-sized monsters, including the mighty Godzilla, who collides with Mothra, Rodan, and his ultimate nemesis, the three-headed King Ghidorah. When these ancient super-species-thought to be mere myths-rise again, they all vie for supremacy, leaving humanity's very existence hanging in the balance.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: Bilbo Baggins lives a simple life with his fellow hobbits in the Shire, until the wizard Gandalf arrives and convinces him to join a group of dwarves on a quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor. The journey takes Bilbo on a path through treacherous lands swarming with orcs, goblins and other dangers, not the least of which is an encounter with Gollum and a simple gold ring that is tied to the fate

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The team realizes that Nick Vera has hit rock bottom after he goes missing; a new twist in a 2006 arson case may help lead to his whereabouts.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: An FBI agent once romantically involved with Stillman asks the team for help finding a serial killer who has evaded her for 30 years.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: After determining a serial killer's identity, the team works with the FBI to apprehend him and protect potential targets.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: An attraction grows between Rush and FBI agent Ryan Cavanaugh as they investigate the 1969 murder of a soldier; jewelry is stolen from Vera's girlfriend's home.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When an off-duty diplomatic security agent is fatally shot in New York City trying to apprehend someone, the team investigates if there's a connection to his time working in Croatia.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The shooting of a federal corrections officer leads the team to an ex-Marine who has gone rogue ever since he returned from Afghanistan; Tiffany's sister looks to her for guidance when their younger brother begins to lash out.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie calls in Remy to aid Scola in his undercover mission to find the terrorists believed to be responsible for the imminent attack in New York.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the deputy commander of an Air National Guard Base is kidnapped, the team must work quickly to find the suspect along with stolen ammunition; Scola questions his own safety in the aftermath of a recent traumatic experience.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a trucker is gunned down after a routine trip from Canada, all signs point the team to a noted criminal on the FBI's Most Wanted Terrorists list; Jubal gets to work with an old friend and colleague, Detective Jack Lombardo.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A drug dealer is shot in a federal park and the team sets out to look for his killer; Maggie's sister returns to New York and complicates the case.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: All eyes are on the team when it tries to find out who kidnapped the only child of a prominent U.S. senator; the abduction also uncovers a potential link to a similar case that was pushed to the side by local authorities.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After finding a group of teens dead from a drug overdose, the team races to find the dangerous dealer and his supplier; OA questions where he stands in his faith.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a prominent doctor is found dead in a ritualistic slaying, the team must race against time to hunt down a religiously motivated serial killer; Scola faces a life-or-death decision.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: Scientists, soldiers and adventurers unite to explore a mythical, uncharted island in the Pacific Ocean. Cut off from everything they know, they venture into the domain of the mighty Kong, igniting the ultimate battle between man and nature. As their mission of discovery soon becomes one of survival, they must fight to escape from a primal world where humanity does not belong.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: Members of the crypto-zoological agency Monarch face off against a battery of god-sized monsters, including the mighty Godzilla, who collides with Mothra, Rodan, and his ultimate nemesis, the three-headed King Ghidorah. When these ancient super-species-thought to be mere myths-rise again, they all vie for supremacy, leaving humanity's very existence hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home. Along for the ride is Jia, an orphaned girl who has a unique and powerful bond with the mighty beast. However, they soon find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla as he cuts a swath of destruction across the globe. The initial confrontation between the two titans -- instigated by unseen forces -- is only the begin

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Vanessa and Jr. prepare for their first ultrasound; the grandparents-to-be go to extremes to find out the sex of the baby; Franklin is worried that Kady will dump him for Willie K.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jay and Michael decide to compete in the New York City Marathon, but Michael does not see the need to adopt Jay's training regimen.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Claire throws a wild party in her parents' absence; a drunken Tony runs naked through the neighborhood.

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: A smart comedy about a day in the life of a barbershop on the south side of Chicago. Calvin (Ice Cube), who inherited the struggling business from his deceased father, views the shop as nothing but a burden and a waste of his time. After selling the shop to a local loan shark, Calvin slowly begins to see his father's vision and legacy and struggles with the notion that he just sold it out.

programme.title: Jumping the Broom
programme.desc: Sabrina Watson (Paula Patton) is a successful corporate lawyer who comes from an old-money family. When she meets Jason Taylor (Laz Alonso), she thinks she's found Mr. Right and eagerly accepts the Wall Street worker's marriage proposal after a whirlwind courtship. However, when Sabrina's aristocratic parents (Angela Bassett, Brian Stokes Mitchell) meet Jason's postal-worker mother (Loretta Devine

programme.desc: Omarion; Trillville.

programme.desc: Kevin Hart; David Banner.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn catches Chad having lunch with another woman; Jen's divorce party heats up.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Cast members reminisce.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: The women discuss the drama with Meeka and the status of Evelyn's relationship.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: When Michael's former bandmate (Clarence Clemons) comes to town for a gig, Michael agrees to sit in as the band's piano player.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael fears the worst when he discovers condoms in Claire's backpack; Jr. accidentally gives Kady a dose of dog medicine.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: When Jay finds mouse droppings, she demands that Michael hire an exterminator, but Michael is determined to handle it himself; Claire accidentally runs over a squirrel while driving home.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: The condition and location of Jr.'s new apartment shocks Jay, who cannot believe her new grandchild might live there.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael loses sight of his daughter in his quest to sell the most chocolate bars during a school candy drive.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jr. and Vanessa shock everyone by selling the Impala after they finish restoring it; Franklin asks Michael how he can act more like a normal kid.

programme.title: Transporter 3
programme.desc: Mob courier Frank Martin's (Jason Statham) latest assignment pairs him with Valentina (Natalya Rudakova), the cynical daughter of a Ukrainian official. While her father ponders what to do with three boatloads of toxic waste, Frank must guard the problematic woman and prevent her from wandering too far from his vehicle, or risk triggering the explosive shackles they both wear.
